user.title: Set Up Brawl Stats Tracker
user.description:
Enter your Brawl Stars API key. You can generate one for free on the [Brawl Stars Developer page](https://developer.brawlstars.com/#/account).

**Important:** The API key is bound to your current public IP address. If your IP changes, use the **Reconfigure** button to update the key.

data_description.api_token: Your personal API key from developer.brawlstars.com
data_description.player_tags: Find tags in-game under Profile → top right corner. Separate multiple tags with a comma.

reconfigure.title: Update API Key
reconfigure.description:
Enter a new API key. This is required when your public IP address has changed.

Generate a new key at [developer.brawlstars.com](https://developer.brawlstars.com/#/account).

data_description.api_token: Your updated personal API key from developer.brawlstars.com

error.invalid_tag: One or more player tags not found. Please check the tags.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or your IP address is not whitelisted.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Brawl Stars API. Please check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Update Players & Settings
init.description: Add or remove player tags, or change the update interval. To change the API key, use the **Reconfigure** button on the integration page instead.

data_description.player_tags: Separate multiple tags with a comma, e.g. #ABC123, #XYZ456
data_description.scan_interval: Minimum 60, recommended: 300 (5 minutes). Changes take effect after reload.

invalid_auth.title: Brawl Stats Tracker: API key invalid
invalid_auth.description:
The API key for **{entry_title}** is no longer working — likely because your public IP address has changed.

Please click **Reconfigure** on the integration card to enter a new key.
